sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الرِّحْلَةُ بِالْقِطَارِ مِنْ أَجْمَلِ تَجَارِبِ السَّفَرِ فِي حَيَاتِي.
sentences.translation: Putovanje vozom jedno je od najljepših putničkih iskustava u mom životu.
sentences.translationEn: The train journey was one of the most beautiful travel experiences in my life.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسْتُ بِجَانِبِ النَّافِذَةِ وَشَاهَدْتُ الأَرِيَافَ وَالْجِبَالَ تَمُرُّ.
sentences.translation: Sjedio sam pored prozora i gledao kako prolaze sela i planine.
sentences.translationEn: I sat by the window and watched the countryside and mountains pass by.

sentences.arabic: تَعَرَّفْتُ عَلَى مُسَافِرٍ مِنَ الْمَدِينَةِ الْمُجَاوِرَةِ وَتَحَدَّثْنَا كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Upoznao sam putnika iz obližnjeg grada i mnogo smo razgovarali.
sentences.translationEn: I met a traveller from a nearby city and we talked a great deal.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ الْقِطَارُ فِي الْمَوْعِدِ الْمُحَدَّدِ تَمَامًا.
sentences.translation: Voz je stigao tačno u zakazano vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: The train arrived exactly on time.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرْتُ أَنَّ الرِّحْلَةَ نَفْسَهَا كَانَتِ الْجُزْءَ الأَجْمَلَ.
sentences.translation: Osjećao sam da je samo putovanje bilo najljepši dio.
sentences.translationEn: I felt that the journey itself was the most beautiful part.
